items.name_en: 🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
items.name_cn:
🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
[New] 👉 GG Marmont Small Shoulder Bag
This GG Marmont small shoulder bag is crafted from quilted V-shaped leather in a refined beige tone, adding a bright new piece to the 2025 Early Spring collection. The item features the series' iconic double G motif, a vintage 1970s symbol that has become a classic element of the brand. Beige quilted V-shaped leather, light gold-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, comes with a keychain that can be connected separately, double G, chain shoulder strap (60cm high), Weight: approx. 0.394kg
Model: 447632.
Size: 24(L)x 13(W)x 7cm(T)
Color: Beige Full Leather/Original Leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Quilted Mini Bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's evolving aesthetic. As a highlight of the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, the leather goods collection is presented in a sophisticated taupe, signaling the arrival of a new season. This GG Marmont Mini Bag is presented in a dazzling way, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Taupe V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with a burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate interior pockets, zip coin pocket, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high), snap closure.
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Quilted Mini Bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's evolving aesthetic. As a highlight of the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, the leather goods collection is presented in a sophisticated taupe, signaling the arrival of a new season. This GG Marmont Mini Bag is presented in a dazzling way, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Taupe V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with a burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate interior pockets, zip coin pocket, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high), snap closure.
Model: 474575.
Size: 20(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Taupe/Original leather.
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Bag
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Bag
A shoulder bag from the Early Autumn Selection series, perfect for creating daily looks. Practical items are reinterpreted with a modern aesthetic philosophy, adorned with the classic interlocking G pattern. This extra mini bag is crafted in beige and blue classic GG canvas and leather, featuring an open pocket and an adjustable shoulder strap.
Beige and blue classic GG canvas and leather
Silver-tone hardware
Classic GG canvas lining
Exterior: one open pocket
Removable adjustable shoulder strap (55cm long)
Magnetic snap closure
Weight: approx. 0.47kg
Made in Italy
Model: 795213
Dimensions: 13(L) x 20(W) x 5cm(H)
Color: Blue canvas/Original leather
Made in Italy

items.name_en: (With full packaging)!!️Ophidia Series Small Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️Ophidia Series Small Shoulder Bag
This Ophidia series shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. The bag comes with two removable shoulder straps, one chain and one leather, and is adorned with classic striped webbing elements and double G hardware. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, beige cotton-linen lining with double G, removable chain shoulder strap (22cm long); removable adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 50cm and 57cm) Zipper closure.
Model: 795194
Dimensions: 24✖️12✖️12cm
Color: Oatmeal/pvc
